name: ai_trends
description: Check current trends in AI using Google Trends, summarize the findings, and write them to a dated results file find_<today>.txt. Unattended; never asks the user anything.

variables.description: The raw trending AI topics and rising search terms collected from Google Trends.
The concise human-readable summary of the AI trends, written to the dated results file.

settings.action: Query Google Trends for trending topics and rising search interest related to artificial intelligence (AI). Collect the top trending AI-related queries, their relative interest, and any notable rising terms into the `trends_findings` slot.

Using `trends_findings`, build a concise report into the `trends_report` slot: list the top trending AI topics, note which are rising vs. stable, and add a one-line takeaway about the overall direction of AI interest.

Write the contents of `trends_report` to a text file named `find_<today>.txt` in the current working directory, where <today> is today's date in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g. find_2026-06-22.txt). Do not ask any questions; this is an unattended run.
